name: provenance manifest cost_telemetry includes tokens_in tokens_out duration_ms model fields
command: printf '{"cost_telemetry":{"tokens_in":1000,"tokens_out":500,"model":"sonnet","duration_ms":1200,"monetary_estimate_usd":0.05}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check cost-telemetry 2>out.txt && grep -q 'tokens_in=1000' out.txt && grep -q 'duration_ms=1200' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
